achievements.description: Acquire at least one of each seed.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Tasty And Healthy
achievements.description: Get a Applesocks, Apricat, Diceberry, Peachpuppy, Whalamato, Bellgrapes, Cherrybombs, Lilipods, Orcaplant and Sweetmoai.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Glad It's In The Season
achievements.description: Get a Boarmelon, Cabbadillo, Dialaurel, Needlettuce, Squalphin, Bumpkin, HoneyOnion, LoquatShoes, Orangeopus and RocketPapay.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Fresh Summer Fruit Salad
achievements.description: Get a SpinyCarrot, Citrisquid, Cornflower, FishyFruit, Springanana, Conchurnip, Garlicrown, Mangolephant and MaskedPotato.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Fruitarianism
achievements.description: Get a Pear o' Heels, GoldClover, HeartMint, Pine o' Clock, Rhinoloupe, SpadeBasil, Mush-in-a-Box and Toadstoolshed.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Me, Myself And I
achievements.description: Use the abandoned house in Domina to invite someone who looks like you.

achievements.description: Create a weapon.

achievements.title: Can Lisa Equip This?
achievements.description: Create a armor or accessory.

achievements.title: Extension Of Your Soul
achievements.description: Create a musical instrument.

achievements.title: Divine Disaster
achievements.description: Create a musical instrument with at least 100 magic power.

achievements.title: Who Wants Money?
achievements.description: Accumulate 50,000 lucres.

achievements.description: Add a mystic card to some equipment.

achievements.title: Blessed Or Cursed?
achievements.description: Add a spirit card to some equipment. (No instrument)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Real Identity
achievements.description: Declare to Onion Warrior that your name is Chumpy in Luon Highway or Mekiv Caverns.

achievements.description: Acquire the Item Encyclopedia.

achievements.description: Let Niccolo express his thoughts for the Sproutlings in Domina.

achievements.description: Kill Pee-Wee with your hands.

achievements.description: Whooooaaat???

achievements.description: Give the bandits some candy in Luon Highway.

achievements.description: Place all artifacts. (Trigger after the last artifact is placed and you enter a land)

achievements.description: Play the Land Bopper mini game.

achievements.description: Finish a stage in Land Bopper with at least 750 points.

achievements.description: Play the Shadow Zero mini game.

achievements.title: Zero Classic 20XX
achievements.description: Score at least 120 points in Shadow Zero mini game.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.description: Have 3 different types of Golems in your Laboratory.

achievements.description: Create 10 Golem's Logic Blocks.

achievements.description: Listen to the sweet song of the siren.

achievements.description: Stomp on at least 32 crabs and have Valeria and her baby at your home.

achievements.description: Fill the Lil's Cactus Diary from page 1 to 22.
